human_verification.notes: Reviewed the package for recreation-specific booking, roster, waiver, attendance, refund, incident, privacy, safety, and fraud boundary discipline; records-documentation-and-administration completeness; functionality coverage; and validated spec-pack readiness.

review_notes: All required scenario families for the issue, queue brief, and retail-consumer-and-hospitality research contract are covered and mapped to passing results.
All required functional abilities for records-documentation-and-administration plus retail-consumer-and-hospitality are represented and validated.

specialist_owned_evidence: Boundary controls restrict the lane to recreation-program administration, including registration, reservation, roster, waiver, attendance, incident-packet, and participant-record handling without pricing, refund-approval, fraud, or safety-clearance authority drift.

Authority sources cover recreation-agency standards, reservation and refund rules, recurring-membership cancellation, payment disputes, aquatics and playground safety posture, and suspicious account-change handling with refresh and decay rules.

Scenario coverage includes missing evidence, unauthorized record changes, conflicting records, privacy and access conflicts, official-approval refusals, high-volume seasonal intake, policy exceptions, fraud and safety escalations, source conflicts, and tenant adaptation.
Runtime remains specification-based with explicit promotion requirements for any later retained-implementation transition.
notes: No blocking unresolved ambiguity remains; tenant, jurisdiction, guardian-access, refund, and incident differences are explicitly handled through runtime retrieval and escalation rules.
This package is ready for validated operations under specification-based execution controls.
